title: GovPreneursOpportunity
description: Normalized schema for a government contracting opportunity extracted from SAM.gov, optimized for RAG vectorization and AI evaluation.

opportunity_id.description: The unique Notice ID from SAM.gov.

response_deadline.description: Critical for filtering out expired opportunities.

naics_code.description: North American Industry Classification System code. Crucial for matching user business profiles.

set_aside.description: e.g., 'Total Small Business', 'Veteran Owned'. Used for strict eligibility filtering.

description.description: The general scope of work or synopsis. This text will be embedded and stored in the vector database.

attachments.description: List of URLs to the actual 50-page RFP PDFs that the RAG pipeline will download, chunk, and analyze.
